tasks.title: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to analyze ClaudeCode's features and capabilities. Document your findings including key functionalities, unique features, and potential gaps in a separate analysis file in target/temp/swarmout.

tasks.title: Product Review and Feature Gap Analysis
tasks.description: Review our current product comprehensively and compare it against the competitor analyses from tasks s1-s4. Identify missing features that should be implemented to remain competitive.

tasks.title: Create SWARMOUT2.md Document
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive document called SWARMOUT2.md in target/temp/swarmout that includes: 1) Summary of feature gaps identified, 2) Detailed implementation plan with milestones and tasks, 3) Prioritization of features based on competitive advantage and implementation effort. Base this on the product review from s5 and competitor analyses from s1-s4.
